questionText: Choose the sentence that is correct about this line graph of stickers earned on a treasure hunt: Monday 8, Tuesday 13, Wednesday 10, Thursday 16, Friday 12. One note says, "Because Friday is 4 more than Monday, the total of all increases is 4."
subject: Maths
learningObjective: Students can interpret data and identify trends in a line graph
issues: [attribution_framing, difficulty_mismatch] | The stem uses attribution framing ('One note says...'), which should be flagged per review rules. | The item is labeled hard, but the task is a fairly direct evaluation with simple additions/subtractions and no non-trivial real-world context, so the cognitive demand is closer to medium than hard. | Fix: Rewrite the stem to remove attribution framing, e.g. ask directly: 'What is the total of all increases shown in the line graph data?' or 'Which option correctly explains the total increases in the graph?' | Fix: Either lower the difficulty level to medium or increase complexity for a hard item by adding richer context/more reasoning, such as comparing total increases to overall change and asking students to justify why they differ.
